name: Verify Admin can change Admin role to Manager
description:
- Login with valid credentials.
- Create new organization via **API**.
- Signup `second user`.
- Invite `second user` to organization with Admin role via **API**.

### Verify that:

- `Admin` can change user role from `Admin` to `Manager`.
- User after changing role from `Admin` to `Manager`:

- Can access organization `Settings`.
- Can access organization `Billing`.
descriptionHtml:
• Login with valid credentials.
  • Create new organization via API.
  • Signup second user.
  • Invite second user to organization with Admin role via API.

Verify that:

  • Admin can change user role from Admin to Manager.

  • User after changing role from Admin to Manager:

  • Can access organization Settings.

  • Can access organization Billing.

testStage.description:
- Login with valid credentials.
- Create new organization via **API**.
- Signup `second user`.
- Invite `second user` to organization with Admin role via **API**.

### Verify that:

- `Admin` can change user role from `Admin` to `Manager`.
- User after changing role from `Admin` to `Manager`:

- Can access organization `Settings`.
- Can access organization `Billing`.
testStage.descriptionHtml:
• Login with valid credentials.
  • Create new organization via API.
  • Signup second user.
  • Invite second user to organization with Admin role via API.

Verify that:

  • Admin can change user role from Admin to Manager.

  • User after changing role from Admin to Manager:

  • Can access organization Settings.

  • Can access organization Billing.
